title: Youtube poop: Mario's GOOD Christmas Gift Part 2
description:
its been a while but its here part 2,
it feels good to be back. ok my computer broke after I submited part 1 (due to reseting during a windows update never ever do that or you will get the evil blue screen of death) so I needed to take it to a repair shop they did fix it, my internet works better but my adobe premiere has been acting stange if anyone knows how to fix the problem (watch till movie ends) please let me know.
plot:(read part 1's plot)
Im getting the hang of adobe premiere you will see some new effects. Lets hope this is better then the first.
